name: browserstack-two-site-demo
description: BrowserStack Playwright Demo — Cross-browser Ecommerce + M&S Flowers

scripts.pretest:ecommerce: kill $(lsof -ti:5338) 2>/dev/null; rm -f ~/.percy/agent-5338.lock || true; cp browserstack.ecommerce.yml browserstack.yml
scripts.pretest:ms-flowers: kill $(lsof -ti:5338) 2>/dev/null; rm -f ~/.percy/agent-5338.lock || true; cp browserstack.ms-flowers.yml browserstack.yml
